relative_path: Waste management/Filled FORTUM Transportation forms/Instructions for chemical wastes handling.docx
full_text:
Fill the wastes form

Send it as an attachment to tehu@ngnordic.com

Print a copy of the wastes form and bring with you to P-floor chemical wastes room, to the folder

Mark the bottle-canister: name of the waste substance, QR code, volume of the waste
